t_ch: 你怎么了？
t_en: What's the matter?

t_ch: 失礼了。只是确认一下，您那两位贵客是否有异样——
t_en: My apologies. I was just checking whether everything was fine with those two distinguished guests of yours...

t_ch: 呵呵。看来一切如常。
t_en: Heh. And it seems like all is well.

t_ch: 继续方才的话题吧，您麾下的将士们……
t_en: Let us continue our previous conversation. Regarding the soldiers fighting for you...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>他们可知为了「律法」的试炼，自己需要付出何种代价？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Are they aware of the price they must pay for the trial of "Law"?</color>

t_ch: 若我没有记错，您因为献祭不足，在与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的对弈中已落败过一次……
t_en: If I recall correctly, you've already lost a bout against {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} due to offering insufficient sacrifices...

t_ch: 你胆敢将我与「失败」二字放在同一句话里？
t_en: You dare mention my name alongside the word "lost"?

t_ch: 恕我失言，凯撒大人。
t_en: Forgive my transgression, great Imperator.

t_ch: 谨言慎行。你只需知道，我在试炼中胜出已是定局。
t_en: Watch your words and actions. All you need to know is that my victory in the trial is guaranteed.

t_ch: 为了征服，就算没有「律法」的试炼，他们也早已宣誓牺牲。所以，告诉我……
t_en: Even without the trial of "Law," they've already sworn to give their lives for my conquest. So, tell me...

t_ch: 若一切按约定进行，你会建议我如何处置那位「救世主」？
t_en: If everything happens according to our agreement, how would you recommend I deal with that "Deliverer"?

t_ch: 好问题。切勿被{M#他}{F#她}蒙骗，那天外之人体内藏着一颗{RUBY_B#星核}毁灭的种子{RUBY_E#}，定不能让{M#他}{F#她}玷污了您的光辉……
t_en: Good question. Do not let {M#him}{F#her} fool you. That {F#wo}man from beyond the sky contains a {RUBY_B#Stellaron}seed of ruin{RUBY_E#} within {M#his}{F#her} body. {M#He}{F#She} must not be allowed to tarnish your glory...

t_ch: 最明智的决定，便是将{M#他}{F#她}交由我来处理。
t_en: Therefore, the wisest decision would be to hand {M#him}{F#her} over to me.

t_ch: 你打算对{M#他}{F#她}动用私刑？
t_en: You plan to torture {M#him?}{F#her?}

t_ch: 或许「实验」是更贴切的词汇。
t_en: Calling it "experimentation" would be more appropriate.

t_ch: 宾客们耐心不多，我打算解开幻境，前去赴宴了。
t_en: The guests' patience is running thin. I plan to remove the fantasia and head into the banquet.

t_ch: 我会采纳你的谏言，暂且退下吧，神礼官，回奥赫玛去。你也不想与那二人正面交锋，不是么？
t_en: I will heed your advice. Leave for now, Theoros, and go back to Okhema. You don't want to confront those two directly either, do you?

t_ch: 正是。
t_en: Indeed.

t_ch: 很遗憾，安提基色拉人不善饮酒。离席前，我愿以精神替代酒杯，敬您那无垠的野心。
t_en: It's a pity that Antikytherans are lightweights when it comes to drinking. Before I leave, I would like to make a toast to your boundless ambition using my spirit instead of a goblet.

t_ch: 果然。那神礼官的阴谋…昭然若揭。
t_en: As I expected... That Theoros's schemes have been revealed.

t_ch: 感谢二位英勇献身，我该解开幻境了。这是凯撒出征前的最后一次致辞，大抵也是令她回心转意的唯一机会。
t_en: Thank you for your bravery, guests. It's time for me to dispel the fantasia. This will be the Imperator's last public address before we head off and, therefore, likely the final chance to change her mind.

t_ch: 我会为你们争取献言的时机，也会做好准备以防不测…接下来，就看二位表现了。
t_en: I will try to get you a chance to speak, and I'll also prepare for any contingencies... The rest is up to you.

t_ch: 记忆的结晶必须要用凸透镜观看……
t_en: Memory Crystals must be examined with a convex lens...

t_ch: …不不不好意思，刚才没认出是你。
t_en: ...S—S—Sorry! I didn't realize it was you.

t_ch: 呃、呃呕…这蜜酿的劲…过得还真快。
t_en: Urk... This honey brew... sure wears off fast.

t_ch: 凯撒——凯撒驾到！
t_en: The Imperator! The Imperator has arrived!

t_ch: 不必多礼了。我因急务来迟，理应给各位赔情。
t_en: No need for formalities. I should be apologizing for my tardiness instead.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#午夜}幕匿{RUBY_E#}将至，诸位也已酒过三巡，我便不再行那繁文缛节——凡与我共同征战过的勇士，早该对那些字句了然于胸。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Midnight}The hour{RUBY_E#} draws late, and I trust you have all had your fill of brews. Therefore, I will not observe the usual ceremonies. Any warrior who has fought by my side should have those speeches memorized by now.

t_ch: 凯撒之言，皆为律令！
t_en: The Imperator's word is law!

t_ch: 你神志不清了吧，断锋爵？凯撒最讨厌溜须拍马之辈。
t_en: Are you out of your mind, Dux Fragoris? The Imperator hates flattery most of all.

t_ch: 呵，欢畅的气氛更能映衬出诸位的决心。我相信，法吉娜一役，众爵也定会和过去一样竭智尽力……
t_en: Hah, a joyous atmosphere is a better fit for showing me your resolve. I believe that you, my dukes, will do all you can to assist in the campaign against Phagousa, just as you always have...

t_ch: 只可惜，我从未验证各位的忠心。
t_en: However, it's a pity that I have never tested your loyalty.

t_ch: 这是…什么意思？
t_en: What does she mean...?

t_ch: 因此，今日的晚宴不为鼓舞士气，而是为了确立同盟真正值得信赖的盟友——
t_en: The purpose of tonight's banquet is not to raise our morale, but to establish which allies our alliance can actually trust...

t_ch: 并斩下叛徒的头颅，为诸君作壮行的酒杯！
t_en: And sever the heads of the traitors as a toast to all before we march!

t_ch: 是啊，我们当中竟有人违弃誓言，酝酿着{M#他们}{F#她们}邪恶的阴谋！现在，听好了：这群叛徒就在光天化日之下，就在这场盛宴当中——
t_en: Yes... Some among us have discarded their vows in order to foment vile conspiracies. Now, listen! These traitors are standing right here in broad daylight...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「剑旗爵」海瑟音——此人用海妖的歌谣令众人深陷幻觉，隐匿行踪。并伙同天外之人窃听机密，意图强夺火种，谋害凯撒！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Dux Gladiorum, Hysilens... She used the sea siren's song to immerse the crowds in an illusion and conceal her whereabouts. She then worked with those from beyond the sky to spy on confidential matters, hoping to rob the Coreflame by force and harm me, the Imperator!</color>

t_ch: 什么情况？！
t_en: What's going on!?

t_ch: 这下又陷入被动了…
t_en: Now we're at a disadvantage again...

t_ch: 这不是完全穿帮了吗？
t_en: So the whole thing's busted?

t_ch: 凯撒，请听我说——
t_en: Imperator, I can explain...

t_ch: ——住口！
t_en: Silence!

t_ch: 还记得吗？在我引荐下，此物主人曾在命运三相殿和诸位见过一面。
t_en: Do you remember who used to own this blade? She met you once, back at the Temple of the Three Fates.

t_ch: 清洗者之首凯妮斯：她是第一个将利刃刺向凯撒的人，亲身为我的敌人们做了表率。
t_en: It was Caenis, the head of the Cleaners. She was the first to draw a blade against the Imperator, and personally made herself an example for my enemies.

t_ch: 在橄榄树荫下，他们说奥赫玛绝不会臣服；在冰冷的死雾中，他们说哀地里亚绝不会臣服；在千门万径起点，他们说雅努萨波利斯绝不会臣服……
t_en: Under the shade of the olive groves, the people of Okhema said they would never bow to me. In the frozen lethal fog, the people of Aidonia said they would never bow to me. At the beginning of the myriad paths, the people of Janusopolis said they would never bow to me...

t_ch: 现在，他们无话可说。他们敬畏我如同敬畏律法：我就是刻律德菈，我就是凯撒——
t_en: But now, they all lie silent. They now fear me as they fear the law, for I am Cerydra, and I am the Imperator!

t_ch: 若你们还有遗言，便向凯撒悉数道来。
t_en: If you have any last words, say them to the Imperator...

t_ch: ——然后，接受她的审判吧。
t_en: Then, face her judgment.

t_ch: 「渡河之后，将是人世间的悲剧；但不渡河，则是自身的沦亡」……
t_en: "After I cross this river, it will be a tragedy for mankind. But if I do not cross, then it will be the end of me."

t_ch: 若你准备好了，我会随你抗争至最后一刻，「救世主」。
t_en: If you are ready, then I'll follow you and fight to the last, "Deliverer."

t_ch: 必须说服刻律德菈…
t_en: We must convince Cerydra...

t_ch: 对，{NICKNAME}……
t_en: That's right, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 没有办法，我们只能刺杀凯撒。
t_en: We must kill the Imperator. There's no other way.

t_ch: 不，{NICKNAME}……
t_en: No, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 相信我！「捷径」已经连通了。
t_en: The "shortcut" is now open. Trust me!

t_ch: 现在，运用你的身份，再加入一点点经验和魅力…向凯撒证明吧，就像我们承诺的那样。
t_en: Now, use your identity, and add in a bit of experience and charm... and testify to the Imperator as we promised.

t_ch: 呵，妄图用唇枪舌剑代替弑君的尖刀么？
t_en: Hah. You think you can slay a king using your words instead of a sword?

t_ch: 可以！我倒要看看，天外的修辞学能有多少重量——是否比三条人命更加沉重？
t_en: I'll have it! Show me the weight of rhetoric from beyond the sky! Will it weigh heavier than three human lives?

t_ch: （…仔细组织语言吧。）
t_en: (...Let's {F#try to }watch our words carefully.)

t_ch: 从三千万世的抗争说起。
t_en: Start with the defiance that lasted thirty million cycles.

t_ch: 在我来到这里前…「负世」的黄金裔，是一位化名白厄的青年，他来自哀丽秘榭。
t_en: Before I arrived in this world... The Chrysos Heir of "Worldbearing" was a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon. He came from Aedes Elysiae.

t_ch: 为了和「再创世」的谎言抗争，让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局…他遍历三千多万次历史，只为在徒劳中找到突破口。
t_en: In order to combat the lies of the "Era Nova" and deliver Amphoreus from the ending of the Destruction... He lived through history more than thirty million times, hoping futilely to find a breakthrough.

t_ch: 从虚假的「再创世」说起。
t_en: Start with the fake "Era Nova."

t_ch: 你们所知的神谕，刻法勒口中的「再创世」…是来古士编造的，彻头彻尾的谎言。
t_en: The prophecy that you know of, the "Era Nova" spoken by Kephale... is nothing but a complete lie spun by Lygus.

t_ch: 为了与那谎言抗争…曾有一位化名白厄的青年踏上了三千多万次轮回，只为让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局。
t_en: To fight that lie... a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon lived through more than thirty million cycles of this world, all to save Amphoreus from the end of the Destruction.

t_ch: 而我身边的少女，昔涟…也同样肩负着沉重的宿命。
t_en: And Cyrene, the young woman standing beside me... also carries an equally heavy destiny.

t_ch: 刻律德菈聆听着你的述说，一言不发。
t_en: Cerydra listens to your words silently.

t_ch: 讲述来古士的罪恶。
t_en: Talk about Lygus's sins.

t_ch: 至于来古士，他根本不是你们的引路人。他不在乎翁法罗斯，更不可能在乎你们的荣誉和征程。
t_en: Lygus is not a guide at all. He doesn't care about Amphoreus, and cares even less about your glory and campaigns.

t_ch: 他唯一在乎的，就是把翁法罗斯的实验推进到底，让「铁墓」降临于世，彻底摧毁银河的秩序。
t_en: The only thing he cares about is completing the Amphorean experiment, making sure Irontomb is born into this world, and using it to utterly destroy the cosmic order.

t_ch: 讲述铁墓的真实身份。
t_en: Talk about Irontomb's true identity.

t_ch: 「铁墓」…它是翁法罗斯命运的终点，行于「毁灭」命途的恐怖化身，根本不可能被驯服。
t_en: "Irontomb"... is the ultimate end of Amphoreus's destiny. It is an embodiment of pure horror that walks the Path of Destruction, and can never be tamed.

t_ch: 它是来古士唯一在乎的事物。翁法罗斯，你们的荣誉和征程…在他眼中根本不值一提。
t_en: That is the only thing Lygus cares about. As for Amphoreus? Your glory and campaigns? ...He doesn't care about any of those.

t_ch: 他一定会背叛你们——等到那时，我们所有人都会在「毁灭」中灰飞烟灭。
t_en: He will most certainly betray you. When that time comes, all of us will be ground to dust by the Destruction.

t_ch: 刻律德菈聆听着你的述说，面不改色。
t_en: Cerydra listens to your words and shows no change in emotion.

t_ch: 讲述「开拓」的使命。
t_en: Talk about the Trailblaze's duty.

t_ch: 我行走在「开拓」的命途上。探索、了解、建立、连结…这是我和同伴始终遵守的信条。征服和毁灭，绝不是与它们架起桥梁的正道！
t_en: I walk the Path of the Trailblaze. My friends and I have always obeyed the creed of "explore, understand, establish, and connect"... Conquest and destruction are never the ways to build bridges between people!

t_ch: 讲述「开拓」的决心。
t_en: Talk about the Trailblaze's resolve.

t_ch: 我见证过许多美丽的世界。探索、了解、建立、连结，这是「开拓」选择的道路，今后也不会改变。我们还会继续旅行下去，团结整片银河。
t_en: I have seen many beautiful worlds. The road chosen by the Trailblaze is to explore, understand, establish, and connect. That will never change. We will continue our journey until we have united the entire cosmos.

t_ch: 所以，如果你选择了「毁灭」的道路……
t_en: Therefore, if you choose the way of the Destruction...

t_ch: 那我绝对会把你的野心，和来古士放在一起——用球棍砸个粉碎！
t_en: Then I'll place your ambitions into the same basket as Lygus, and smash them into pieces with my baseball bat!

t_ch: 呵…呵呵……
t_en: Hah... Hahah...

t_ch: 当真…是一场混乱的演说啊。
t_en: That... was truly a chaotic speech.

t_ch: 不必再多说什么了……
t_en: All that needs to be said has been said.

t_ch: 断锋爵、冬霖爵，来！将背盟者押入地牢！
t_en: Dux Fragoris! Dux Brumalis! Escort the traitors to the prison!

t_ch: 今日{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}前，我便会给{M#他们}{F#她们}一个与叛逆相称的结局……
t_en: Before the next {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}, I will give them an end befitting of their betrayal...

t_ch: 凯撒大人，您的野心果然大过一切。
t_en: O Great Imperator, your ambition certainly eclipses all things.

t_ch: 神礼官，你还未离去么？
t_en: You're still here, Theoros?

t_ch: 当然。身为神礼观众，我切不可错过这一幕：见证一位无名之人的陨落。
t_en: Of course. As the Theoros, I simply cannot miss this moment: miss witnessing the fall of a nameless one.

t_ch: 或者，我在等待您给我一个答案：铁腕如您，何必多此一举……
t_en: Or perhaps, I am waiting for you to give me an answer. Why would someone as powerful as you...

t_ch: 妄图用「押送」这种拙劣的借口，保全「救世主」的安全？
t_en: ...Use such a clumsy excuse as "imprisonment" to ensure the Deliverer's safety?

t_ch: 呵，终于卸下伪装了啊。
t_en: Hah. So you've finally tossed aside your act.

t_ch: 我必须指出：论演技之精湛，您也不遑多让。这场宴会从一开始就是您的布局……
t_en: I must point out that you are just as impressive an actor. This banquet was always going to be a game of chess...

t_ch: 只为制衡双边，意图将鄙人和{M#他们}{F#她们}都变作你手中的棋子。
t_en: Where you would try to control both sides and turn both them and me into your pawns.

t_ch: 这一切都是伪装？
t_en: Was all of this just a performance?

t_ch: 对。恐怕小凯撒从未信任任何人，自始至终她只想看看，究竟哪边能献上更多诚意……
t_en: That's right. That little Imperator never trusted anyone. She was always trying to see which side had more sincerity...

t_ch: 好啦好啦，会配合你的，给——请替我们转告凯撒：无论何时何地，她都可以信任{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust {NICKNAME} anywhere, anytime.

t_ch: 但凯撒要做的选择…{NICKNAME}从无僭越之意。我们只想把知道的一切坦诚相告，毫无保留。
t_en: But as to the decision the Imperator must make... {NICKNAME} has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.

t_ch: 现在，运用你的身份，再加入一点点经验和魅力…向凯撒证明吧，就像我们承诺的那样。
t_en: Now, use your identity, and add in a bit of experience and charm... and testify to the Imperator as we promised.

t_ch: 是我们赢了，「真诚」才是永远的捷径。
t_en: And we won. "Sincerity" will always remain the greatest shortcut to people's hearts.

t_ch: 倒是你，吕枯耳戈斯，明明拥有这般伟力，却要装作凡人，卑躬屈膝……
t_en: I can toss your words right back at you, Lycurgus. Why would someone as powerful as you pretend to be a mortal and kneel before me?

t_ch: 莫非，阿谀奉承是你的癖好不成？
t_en: ...Unless you enjoy giving flattery and prostrating yourself?

t_ch: 您误会了。我只是力求实验自主、缜密、完美，避免节外生枝。暴力干涉只会扩大误差，低效，而又丑陋。
t_en: You are mistaken. I am only trying to ensure the experiment's autonomy, meticulousness, and perfection, thus avoiding any unexpected outcomes. A forceful intervention will only create larger errors, reduce efficiency, and introduce ugliness.

t_ch: 若您遵守盟约，将「律法」移交于我，并按部就班地完成「再创世」，翁法罗斯本不会偏离命运的正轨……
t_en: Had you fulfilled your promise of giving the "Law" to me and completing the "Era Nova," then Amphoreus would not have deviated from destiny's course...

t_ch: 但很可惜，您失约了。因此，身为管理者，我将履行义务，肃清一切失控的因素。
t_en: But you broke your promise. What a pity. In that case, I must carry out my duty as the administrator and eradicate all factors steering the experiment out of control.

t_ch: 譬如你，譬如——{M#他}{F#她}。
t_en: Factors such as you and {M#him.}{F#her.}

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，小心……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, careful...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，小心……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, careful...

t_ch: 什么？这声音…是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}？
t_en: What was that voice? Was it... {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 找到了，找到了……
t_en: I found you. I finally found you...

t_ch: 小心…此地…将迎来劫难……
t_en: Be careful... This land... will face disaster...

t_ch: 审判之时已至。{NICKNAME}阁下，我为您建设的监牢已经竣工……
t_en: The time of judgment is nigh. My {M#lord}{F#lady} {NICKNAME}, the prison I have built for you is now complete...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>以「智识」之名，我将邀请您——步入与我相同的囚笼。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the Erudition, I invite you to step into the same cage as mine.</color>

t_ch: 别忘了，我的王朝只允许「人」的存在……
t_en: Don't forget. My realm only allows for the existence of "humanity."

t_ch: 至于动用私刑——更是视同颠覆「律法」，罪该万死。
t_en: Moreover, dealing out extrajudicial punishment equates to defying the "Law," and the culprit is to be sentenced to death.

t_ch: 但，您看到了：只需一次简单的合掌，我便能将生命于这世间抹除……
t_en: But you have seen how I can erase life from this world with just a clap of my hands.

t_ch: 您仍然没能看清自己的立场。请容我重申——
t_en: I fear you are still quite unaware of your current situation. Allow me to reiterate...

t_ch: 我给予您的选择，简截了当：合作，或是毁灭，再无其他。
t_en: I am giving you a simple choice: To collaborate or to be destroyed. There is no other way.

t_ch: 大言不惭。倘若你能，何不早早杀之后快？
t_en: Shameless behavior. If that were true, you would have killed me long ago.

t_ch: 因为你做不到。第一次斩下你的头颅时，我便早有预料：出于{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>终极协议</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「律法」</color>{RUBY_E#}，黄金裔无法将你彻底消灭，反之亦然。
t_en: You, in fact, cannot kill me. I guessed it the first time I beheaded you: Because of the {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Ultimate Protocol</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"Law,"</color>{RUBY_E#} you cannot be completely destroyed, and the same is true of the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 现在，你越是虚张声势，便越能印证这一事实。
t_en: The more you bluff now, the more you are proving that conjecture to be true.

t_ch: 卓越的眼界。我曾将您这宝贵的品质视作我必胜的信号。但如今，我不得不承认自己的错误——
t_en: What magnificent foresight. I once regarded this precious quality of yours as a sure sign of my ultimate victory, but now I have to admit that I made a mistake.

t_ch: 区区凡人，要如何才能与「神礼观众」抗衡？
t_en: Yet, as a mere mortal, how will you contend against the Theoros?

t_ch: 你我皆是傲慢的俘虏。但吕枯耳戈斯，知道我们的区别在哪吗？我不会因傲慢变得盲目。
t_en: We are both slaves to hubris, but do you know what differentiates us, Lycurgus? I will never be blinded by my pride.

t_ch: 想要打破天秤平衡——
t_en: If I wish to break the scales' balance...

t_ch: ——诉诸外力，为己所用便是。
t_en: I only need to appeal to external forces and use them for my own ends.

t_ch: 终于见到真家伙了啊，*前辈*。
t_en: Finally, we get to meet face-to-face... Senior Society Member.

t_ch: 为您过去达成的诸多成就，我向您致敬；但对于您当下的立场，我深表遗憾。
t_en: I offer sincere acknowledgements for your many past achievements, but I must deeply regret your current perspective.

t_ch: 请相信我，螺丝咕姆。此时此刻，深感遗憾的不止你一人。
t_en: Trust me when I say that you aren't the only one feeling regret right now, Screwllum.

t_ch: 看来，你二人就是救世主索求「律法」神权的原因，{M#他}{F#她}口中的天外盟友。
t_en: So you two are the allies from beyond the sky the Deliverer spoke of, and why {F#s}he demanded the divine authority of "Law."

t_ch: 来吧，证明你们的实力：让我见识所谓「命途」的力量。我费心尽力将这天外奇珍收入囊中，正是为了这一刻。
t_en: Come and prove your strength to me. Show me the power of these so-called "Paths." I have spent much time and effort to secure this treasure from beyond the sky just for this moment.

t_ch: 以螺丝星君主之名：您的盟友响应召唤而来，尊贵的凯撒。
t_en: In the name of the sovereign of Planet Screwllum, your allies have responded to your call, esteemed Imperator.

t_ch: 来古士阁下，请允许我指出：现在，{RUBY_B#「律法」}终极协议{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#火种}读取权限{RUBY_E#}已在我们手中，掌握{RUBY_B#神权}写入与执行权限{RUBY_E#}只是时间问题。
t_en: Please allow me to spell the situation out for you, Lord Lygus: {RUBY_B#Coreflame}Permission to read{RUBY_E#} the {RUBY_B#"Law"}Ultimate Protocol{RUBY_E#} is already in my hands. It'll only be a matter of time before we acquire the {RUBY_B#Divine Authority}authority to write and execute commands{RUBY_E#} as well.

t_ch: 在你撕破脸皮后，逐火之旅也不可能进行下去了。你觉得自己还有赢面吗——看在俱乐部的份上，别让事情变得太难看。
t_en: There's no way the Flame-Chase Journey will continue after you've burnt your bridges so thoroughly like this. Do you really think you can still win? ...Seriously, don't embarrass the Society.

t_ch: 我明白：几乎必然并非必然。对我而言，它相当具有说服力……
t_en: I understand that a near-zero possibility does not equate to zero. That argument is very persuasive to me.

t_ch: 所以，同袍们，此原理对你们也同样适用。
t_en: Which means... the same principle also applies to you, my dear peers.

t_ch: 在十四行代数式构筑的世界展开攻防，你们不可能是我的对手；而至于「再创世」……
t_en: You will never be a match for me in a world constructed through quatorzain algebraic expressions. And as for the Era Nova...

t_ch: 试想这样一种可能性：若我将奥赫玛夷为平地，将她的人民碾作死灰，列位英雄又是否会重新觊觎半神的力量，以便与我相抗？
t_en: Why don't you entertain this possibility? What if I reduced Okhema to rubble and ground her people into minced meat? Would the heroes then once again desire the power of demigods, so they could fight against me?

t_ch: 听好：铁墓必将诞生。要想让「毁灭」降临，纵使身负枷锁，我也有千般方法……
t_en: Listen: Irontomb is fated to be born. You may shackle me and put me in chains, but I have thousands of ways to ensure the Destruction's descent...

t_ch: 而我方才所述，仅是千分之一。
t_en: And what I just mentioned is only one out of those thousands.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，看！前面就是会场了。
t_en: Look, {NICKNAME}! The venue's right ahead.

t_ch: 还有歌声呢！气氛真浪漫。
t_en: And I can even hear singing! It feels so romantic.

t_ch: 明明是宴会的主角，刻律德菈却不在吗？
t_en: Isn't Cerydra supposed to be the focus of the banquet? But she's not even here.

t_ch: 想和她说上几句话，真是困难重重呀……
t_en: Why is it so difficult to talk to her...

t_ch: 不过，到处都是人群。即便凯撒来了，我们也找不着她……
t_en: Actually, there are so many people... We wouldn't be able to find the Imperator even if she were here.

t_ch: …有了，留意下附近有没有被垫高的座位吧。
t_en: ...I know. Let's look for seats that are raised up higher than others.

t_ch: 等仗打完，我们就结婚吧！
t_en: Let's get married after the war's over!

t_ch: 那你可得活着回来啊！
t_en: Then you've got to come back alive!

t_ch: 呃，蜜酿有些喝多了…
t_en: That was a bit too much honey brew...

t_ch: 头好晕，果汁也会醉吗？
t_en: My head's so dizzy. Can you even get drunk on fruit juice?

t_ch: 你也上去来一段？
t_en: You wanna go show off some moves?

t_ch: 饶了我吧，明天还要行军呢。
t_en: Spare me... We're marching to war tomorrow.

t_ch: 讨伐泰坦…真的有必要吗？
t_en: Is it... really necessary to campaign against the Titans?

t_ch: 喝蜜酿吧，小心别人听见。
t_en: Just drink your honey brew and make sure no one heard that.

t_ch: 觉不觉得有点冷？
t_en: Don't you feel a bit cold?

t_ch: 蜜酿喝少了导致的。
t_en: It's 'cause you haven't had enough honey brew.

t_ch: 灰鱼儿，小海兔……
t_en: Gray fry, little sea hare...

t_ch: 请来这里，与我共享海底的奇珍吧。
t_en: Please come over and share the delicacies of the deep sea with me.

t_ch: 是…紧张刺激的卧底环节…！
t_en: It's... the exciting and thrilling undercover part of the adventure!

t_ch: 现在，先回席位上吧。
t_en: You should head back to your seats for now.

t_ch: 剑旗爵仍在吟唱迷人的歌声，若无她递来的佳酿，你们也会如周遭的宴客一样，沉在歌喉与舌华的浪里。
t_en: Dux Gladiorum still sings her bewitching tune. Without the fine wine she offered, you might have drowned in the tide of her honeyed voice, just like the rest of the guests.

t_ch: （这里是…「神话之外」？）
t_en: (This is... the "Exomyth"?)

t_ch: （气氛似乎和上次不太一样，该怎么回去……）
t_en: (This doesn't feel the same as before. How should I get back...?)

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>{NICKNAME}——异常量已锁定。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Locked onto outlier: {NICKNAME}]</color>

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>执行：隔离指令。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Executing command: Isolation]</color>

t_ch: （隔离…指令？）
t_en: (Command... isolation?)

t_ch: 自上次分别过后，我便着手将「神话之外」改造为专属于您的「观众席」。现在，您可以于此静待翁法罗斯的终幕上演了。
t_en: Since we parted ways last time, I have modified the Exomyth into an "audience area" exclusive to you. Now, you'll be able to silently wait here for the final act of Amphoreus to begin.

t_ch: 放我出去！
t_en: Let me out!

t_ch: 我理解您的愤怒，但恕我不能容许阁下继续影响演算的进程。
t_en: I understand your anger, but I cannot allow you to continuously influence the extrapolation's progress.

t_ch: 别逼我动手。
t_en: Don't make me hurt you.

t_ch: 呵呵，看来您已经忘记了…在此处，我们无法对彼此出手。
t_en: Heh, it seems you have already forgotten... We can't hurt each other in this place.

t_ch: 我是玩家，不是观众！
t_en: I'm the player! Not the audience!

t_ch: 在命运面前，我们总会身不由己，不是么？
t_en: We always feel so powerless before fate, don't we?

t_ch: 对您而言，这或许是一个绝佳的机会：以观众的视角，从更为宏观的角度观察「智识」的运作。
t_en: This could in fact be a wonderful opportunity for you. From the audience's perspective, you may better observe the workings of the Erudition at a macroscopic level.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>在这片时间流速远慢于世界内部的空间，您将亲眼见证翁法罗斯的史诗…步入尾声。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>In this place, where time flows far slower than within Amphoreus, you will witness... the end of that world's saga.</color>

t_ch: 你到底想要什么？
t_en: What exactly are you after?

t_ch: 流速…慢于翁法罗斯？
t_en: Where time flows... slower than within Amphoreus?

t_ch: 没错。此地的时间流速，无限接近于你熟悉的现实宇宙。
t_en: Indeed. The speed of time here is infinitesimally close to that of the real universe you're familiar with.

t_ch: 你到底想要什么？
t_en: What exactly are you after?

t_ch: 我一定会想到办法出去的。
t_en: I'll definitely find a way out of here.

t_ch: 啊，我不怀疑您创造奇迹的能力。
t_en: Oh, I am not doubting your capacity to create miracles.

t_ch: 你到底想要什么？
t_en: What exactly are you after?

t_ch: 有关「生命第一因」的解答，以及……
t_en: The answer concerning "the prime mover of life," and...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「智识」的毁灭。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...the total destruction of the Erudition.</color>

t_ch: 你…也憎恨星神吗？
t_en: You... also hate the Aeons?

t_ch: 你不是「智识」令使吗？
t_en: Aren't you an Emanator of Erudition?

t_ch: 阁下将我视为祂忠诚的信徒，对么？
t_en: Do you see me as THEIR faithful disciple?

t_ch: 实则不然。<color=#dbc291ff>我竭心尽力促成铁墓的诞生，只为纠正「智识」这一由人亲手造就的错谬。</color>
t_en: I am certainly not. <color=#dbc291ff>I have tried so hard to ensure Irontomb's birth, just so that I can correct the error named "Erudition" that humanity crafted with their own hands.</color>

t_ch: 我无比怀念。在博识尊尚未诞生的年代，知识的边界就像星空，令人心驰神往，欢呼雀跃。
t_en: How I yearn to return to those days before Nous was born. Back then, the boundaries of knowledge were like the starry skies, evoking feelings of longing and delight among humankind.

t_ch: 可如今，「真理」二字成了觐见祂的祭品，天才会说：博识尊早已知晓。
t_en: But now... "truth" has become the sacrificial offering required to gain an audience with THEM, and the geniuses would say that Nous already knew.

t_ch: 那傲慢的星神，从人类求知的原动力中诞生，却亲手封锁了凡人求知的道途。我要做的，不过是砍倒一棵被我等种下的祸世之树。
t_en: That arrogant Aeon was born from the Primum Mobile of humans' desire for knowledge, yet THEY THEMSELF sealed off humanity's capacity to seek enlightenment. I am simply cutting down a tree of doom that we planted ourselves.

t_ch: 我必须承认，为您解惑的过程…总能令我回忆起年少求学的快意时光。但很遗憾，此刻，在翁法罗斯内部，我的正身…不得不下场应对因您而起的「意外」。
t_en: I must admit that the process of answering your questions has... reminded me of the happy days of learning in my youth. However, it is a pity that my true form must now descend into Amphoreus to deal with the "accident" that arose because of you.

t_ch: 不过，无需等待太久。待到落幕时分，您一定能理解我与翁法罗斯的心愿。
t_en: But you won't have to wait long. When the curtain falls, you'll surely understand mine and Amphoreus's ardent wish.

t_ch: （「时间流速慢于翁法罗斯」…？如果来古士没有撒谎，那留给我的时间不多了。）
t_en: ("Where time flows slower than within Amphoreus..."? If Lygus spoke the truth, then I don't have much time left.)

t_ch: （可是…该怎么离开呢？）
t_en: (But... how can I get out of here?)

t_ch: 这智械哥百密一疏，终于让我和螺丝抓住机会了。
t_en: That old Intellitron overlooked one little detail, and Screwy and I finally found an opportunity.

t_ch: 黑塔大人，救救我！
t_en: Save me, Madam Herta!

t_ch: 外面发生什么事了？
t_en: What's happening outside?

t_ch: 长话短说吧，你不在的这段时间——对于翁法罗斯而言的「这几年」里……
t_en: Let's keep it short. While you were gone... well, in those few years, Amphoreus...

t_ch: 等等，几年？！
t_en: Wait. A few years!?

t_ch: 时间膨胀、流速不统一什么的…你不是已经知道了么？
t_en: Yes. Time dilation, resulting in an uneven flow... Don't you know this already?

t_ch: 接着说重点。黄金裔们启动了识刻锚，帮我和螺丝咕姆打开了「防火墙」的口子。我们临时做了点操作，让他没办法出手，但也只是暂时的——
t_en: Let's stick to the main points. The Chrysos Heirs activated the Chronocognitive Anchor and helped Screwllum and me open a hole in the "firewall." We made some adjustments, so he can't attack us immediately, but it won't hold for long...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>已锁定异常数据。确认为非法通信，开始处理……</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Abnormal data, locked on. Unauthorized communication, confirmed. Initiating response...]</color>

t_ch: 啧。时间不多了，直接说结论……
t_en: Tch. Time is running out. Here's the conclusion...

t_ch: 直到黄金裔们完全掌握「律法」前，我和螺丝要想彻底攻破这座牢笼，恐怕还得花上相当久的时间……
t_en: It'll probably take a long time for Screwy and me to completely break this cage before the Chrysos Heirs have a full grasp of the "Law"...

t_ch: 保险起见：我们会持续进行旁道攻击，给你创造逃生机会；而你得抓住机会，动起来，自己想办法来个漂亮的越狱。
t_en: To be safe, we'll continue to launch side-channel attacks on the system to give you opportunities to escape. You need to seize these opportunities. Now, start moving and find a way to pull off a magnificent jailbreak.

t_ch: 那…有什么办法吗？
t_en: So... how should I do that?

t_ch: …你来就是为了说这个？
t_en: ...That's all you have to say?

t_ch: 我们感知到…另一条…命途…的影响……
t_en: We detected... another... Path's... influence...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>传输信道解析完毕，正在切断非法通信……</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Communication channel analysis completed. Terminating unauthorized communication...]</color>

t_ch: 力量…相当强大…它也许能帮你……
t_en: Its power... is strong... may be able... to help...

t_ch: 用命途的力量…让它感知到……
t_en: Use the Path's power... Make it detect you...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>非法通信已中止。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>Unauthorized communication, terminated.</color>

t_ch: （黑塔的意思是…某个派系来到了翁法罗斯，可以向他们求救吗？）
t_en: (Is Herta saying... a certain Path's faction has arrived in Amphoreus, and I can ask them for help?)

t_ch: （在过去的旅途中，我掌握了不同的命途力量…好好想想，来到翁法罗斯的到底是什么势力…该用哪一种命途的力量呼唤援助……）
t_en: (I mastered the powers of different Paths in my previous journeys... Think hard, and figure out exactly which faction has arrived at Amphoreus... and which Path's power I should use to call for reinforcements...)

t_ch: （这里呈现的…是我过去的记忆吗？）
t_en: (Are these... showing my memories?)

t_ch: （体内拥有星核的我，在空间站「黑塔」苏醒，得到了「毁灭」的力量……）
t_en: (With a Stellaron in my body, I woke up at the Herta Space Station and gained the power of the Destruction...)

t_ch: （一个诞育绝灭大君的世界，一定会引来「毁灭」的关注，我肚子里的星核有大用咯。）
t_en: (A world that'll give rise to a Lord Ravager would definitely draw the attention of the Destruction. The Stellaron in my belly is gonna be super useful~)

t_ch: （…但要是叫来反物质军团和泯灭帮，真的能帮上忙吗？）
t_en: (...But what if I end up pulling in the Antimatter Legion or the Annihilation Gang? Can they really help?)

t_ch: 集中精神，与「毁灭」同调。
t_en: Focus and resonate with the Destruction.

t_ch: 纳努克！借我火焰烧穿监牢。
t_en: Nanook! Lend me flames hot enough to burn through this jail!

t_ch: 你集中精神，尝试令心跳的节奏与那簇金焰窜动的频率共振……
t_en: You focus your mind, trying to sync your heartbeat's rhythm with the frequency of that dancing golden flame...

t_ch: 你在清醒与癫狂的边界试探着，小心翼翼地调度神志的走向，轻轻叩击「毁灭」的门扉……
t_en: You're walking the line between sanity and madness, carefully steering the course of your consciousness, gently knocking on the door of Destruction...

t_ch: …你放弃了。那狂乱的召唤过于诱人，以你的修为还无法完全与之抗衡。倘若在此刻坠入「毁灭」的黑渊…或许一切都将陷入万劫不复。
t_en: ...you gave up. The beckoning of the chaos was too tempting, and your current power level wasn't enough to fully resist it. If you were to fall into the black abyss of Destruction at this moment... perhaps everything would be lost to the void.

t_ch: （失败不一定是坏事，毕竟被这股力量叫来的肯定不是善茬……）
t_en: (Failure is not necessarily a bad thing... This power wasn't gonna call up anyone nice, after all...)

t_ch: （在贝洛伯格，我取得了筑城者遗留在此处的炎枪，得到了「存护」的力量……）
t_en: (I obtained the flaming lance left by the Architects and gained the power of the Preservation in Belobog...)

t_ch: （对啊，无论是多么偏远的角落，只要潜藏商机，一定能引来公司关注，翁法罗斯不就是一片未被开发的商业蓝海吗？）
t_en: (That's right! No matter how far away a planet is, the IPC is guaranteed to pay attention as long as there's a business opportunity. Isn't Amphoreus a pristine and untapped market?)

t_ch: （哪怕叫不来公司的朋友，筑城者和游牧矿工也应该能帮上忙，毕竟这里有城也有矿。）
t_en: (Besides, even if I can't call up my friends from the IPC, the Architects and the nomadic miners should be able to help too. There are definitely cities and ores in this world.)

t_ch: 集中精神，与「存护」同调。
t_en: Focus and resonate with the Preservation.

t_ch: 克里珀！借我铁锤砸穿监牢。
t_en: Qlipoth! Lend me hammers hard enough to smash through this jail!

t_ch: 你集中精神，尝试用心跳模拟克里珀筑墙的锤击……
t_en: You focus intently, trying to mimic the Qlipoth's wall-building hammer strikes with your heartbeat...

t_ch: 再一次——你只需要再一次寻回与那位大守护者交战时的心绪，用双手接住那一锤溅出的火花……
t_en: Once again — you just need to recapture that feeling from your battle with the Supreme Guardian, and catch the sparks from that hammer strike with your own hands...

t_ch: …但是什么都没有发生！克里珀无视了你，正如它在漫长的年代中忽视了无数看向它的信众。
t_en: ...but nothing happened! Qlipoth ignored you, just as THEY had ignored countless devotees who looked up to THEM throughout the ages.

t_ch: （看来，公司的大手也伸不到没有海外市场的翁法罗斯……）
t_en: (Seems like since Amphoreus has no overseas market, the IPC's hand can't reach it...)

t_ch: （在匹诺康尼，我接过了「钟表匠」的礼帽，向「秩序」宣战，得到了「同谐」的力量……）
t_en: (I received the Watchmaker's hat in Penacony and declared war against the Order, then gained the power of the Harmony...)

t_ch: （对啊！心怀大爱的家族一定还记得我这位恩人，他们的乐音遍布寰宇，肯定愿意伸出援手。）
t_en: (That's right! The benevolent Family must still remember me for saving them! Their music echoes throughout the stars, and they'll definitely want to help.)

t_ch: （来吧，让我戴上吃灰了好几个章节的礼帽。和钟表小子高唱——普世同谐，群星共熠……）
t_en: (Come! Let me put on the dear hat that's been set aside for quite a few chapters! Sing with Clockie: The world is in harmony and the stars shine bright...)

t_ch: 集中精神，与「同谐」同调。
t_en: Focus and resonate with the Harmony.

t_ch: 希佩，用歌声指引我离开吧。
t_en: Xipe! Use your song to guide me out of here!

t_ch: 你集中精神，尝试在脑海中哼鸣同谐颂的旋律……
t_en: You focus your mind, trying to hum the Ode to Harmony in your thoughts...

t_ch: 前辈无名客们的形象逐一映现，只要融入他们遥远的合唱，也许道路就会在你面前显现……
t_en: The visages of past Nameless appear one by one. If you blend into their faraway song, perhaps a path will appear before you...

t_ch: …你失败了。「神话之外」的壁障扼杀了那遥远的乐声，将它们如无用的杂音一般彻底过滤，只留下冰冷的沉寂。
t_en: ...you failed. The barrier of the "Exomyth" strangled those distant melodies, filtering them out completely like useless noise, leaving only cold silence.

t_ch: （来古士不想让这场故事有配乐吗，真是个没品味的观众……）
t_en: (Doesn't Lygus want this story to have background music? He has such terrible taste...)
(The Remembrance...)

t_ch: （对啊，我应黑天鹅之邀来到翁法罗斯，还在此接受了浮黎的瞥视，流光忆庭一定与翁法罗斯有千丝万缕的联系……）
t_en: (That's right... I came to Amphoreus because Black Swan asked us to come, and I even got a glance from Fuli here. The Garden of Recollection must be intricately involved with Amphoreus...)

t_ch: （记忆在此处的行迹也处处可见，虽然不知道他们意图为何，但身处绝境，没有更多选择……）
t_en: (Traces of the Remembrance are also everywhere in this world. I don't know what they want, but I don't have many choices left in this crisis...)

t_ch: 浮黎，回应我吧！
t_en: Fuli, answer me!

t_ch: 相信我吧——
t_en: Trust me—

t_ch: 你调用了「记忆」的命途力量，等待着援兵的回响……
t_en: You invoke the power of Remembrance, awaiting the resonance of reinforcements...

t_ch: 在记忆的力量流淌过后，一个不应存在于此的事物，在你的眼前浮现……
t_en: After the power of Remembrance flows through, something that should not exist here materializes before your eyes...

t_ch: 终于…循着记忆的声音…找到你了…「记忆」与「开拓」交汇的行者……
t_en: I finally... found you... following the sound of memories... A pathstrider walking both the Remembrance and the Trailblaze...

t_ch: 这是…欧洛尼斯的使者么？
t_en: Is this... a messenger of Oronyx?

t_ch: 等等，这个声音是……
t_en: Wait... this sounds like...

t_ch: 它柔和的低语像是一只温热的手，牵起你的灵魂，缓缓向界外散逸……
t_en: Their soft whisper is like a warm hand that takes up your soul and slowly disperses it beyond this realm...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>警告！检测到非法访问…无法锁定信号来源……</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Warning! Unauthorized access detected... Cannot lock onto signal source...]</color>

t_ch: 嘻…「智识」的监牢可拦不住我们，我们不在0和1的逻辑之中……
t_en: Teehee... Erudition's prison cannot stop us, for we lie outside the logic of zeros and ones...

t_ch: 来吧…离开{RUBY_B#理性}逻各斯{RUBY_E#}的监牢……
t_en: Come... Leave the cage of {RUBY_B#reason}logos{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的{RUBY_B#神话}秘所思{RUBY_E#}，亟待你来续写……
t_en: The {RUBY_B#mythology}mythos{RUBY_E#} of Amphoreus... waits for you to continue its story...

t_ch: 「当那颗最明亮的星辰，那颗预示黎明的星辰升起时……」
t_en: "When that brightest star, that star heralding the dawn, finally rises..."

t_ch: 「一条习惯飘泊的船儿，终于驶入了海岛的臂湾。」
t_en: "A boat, so used to drifting, at long last enters an island's safe embrace."

t_ch: 命途行者啊…我们已助你解脱……
t_en: O Pathstrider... We have helped you break free...

t_ch: 快点前去吧…记忆的孩子…在等候你……
t_en: Hurry and set off... The child of Remembrance... awaits you...

t_ch: 啊，你终于来了呀……
t_en: Ah. You're finally here...

t_ch: 我们真是好久、好久都没有见面了……
t_en: We haven't seen each other for such a long, long time...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}——你这家伙，我真是想死你了！
t_en: {NICKNAME}... I've really, really missed you!

t_ch: 三月！我也想死你了！
t_en: March! I've really missed you too!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，你肯定天天都在怀念有本姑娘陪着的日子吧？
t_en: Hehe, I bet you were constantly thinking about the days when I was by your side!

t_ch: 三月七，堂堂复活！
t_en: March 7th, back alive and kicking!

t_ch: 说什么呢，本姑娘什么时候死了？
t_en: Huh? When was I dead?

t_ch: 抱歉…一直没来得及去找你。
t_en: I'm sorry... I never found the time to go see you.

t_ch: 别这么伤感嘛，我们这不是再见了吗？
t_en: Don't be so sad. Aren't we seeing each other right now?

t_ch: 唉，在这个地方等你真是太无聊了！没人陪我聊天，没有网，连吃的喝的都没有——简直跟坐牢一样！
t_en: It's been so boring, waiting for you in this place! There's no one to chat with, no internet, and not even anything to eat or drink. It's basically a prison!

t_ch: 终于！咱们的大英雄{NICKNAME}来救我啦！万岁！
t_en: Now the great hero {NICKNAME} is finally here to save me! Yippee!

t_ch: 这段时间，你肯定在翁法罗斯遇见了很多事吧？接下来可要给本姑娘好好讲讲哦。
t_en: You must have seen a lot in Amphoreus during this time, right? You gotta tell me all about it.

t_ch: 那是一段漫长的旅程…
t_en: It's been a long and arduous journey...

t_ch: 那就慢慢讲呗。怎么，你就不想跟我多说点儿话？
t_en: Then take your time with the storytelling! Or do you not want to talk to me?

t_ch: 你身体好些了吗？
t_en: Are you doing better now?

t_ch: 当然啦。你看我现在——活蹦乱跳的，好得很呢。
t_en: I'm all good. Look at how fit and active I am!

t_ch: 不过，咱们先别在这个阴森森的地方聊天了，这场面一点也不适合重逢。
t_en: But let's get out of this spooky place first. This is not a good spot for a reunion chat.

t_ch: 带我回现实吧！有个奇怪的声音告诉我，沿着这条路一直走下去，就能进入翁法罗斯——
t_en: Why don't you take me back to reality! A strange voice told me that I can enter Amphoreus if I keep following this road...

t_ch: 走吧走吧，我还不知道这世界长什么样子呢～
t_en: So, let's head off! I still don't know what that world even looks like~

t_ch: （怎么回事，三月给人的感觉…好奇怪。）
t_en: (Why... does March feel so weird?)

t_ch: 还愣着干嘛，你不会很喜欢这个地方吧？快走啦！
t_en: What are you standing around for? Do you actually like this place? Get moving!

t_ch: …你怎么啦？从刚才开始，一句话都不说。
t_en: ...Are you okay? You haven't said anything for a while.

t_ch: 难道是太久不见，想我了？但现在没时间磨磨蹭蹭啦，黄金裔和天才们都在等你呢，对不对？
t_en: Has it been so long that you're still missing me? There's no time to waste, though. The Chrysos Heirs and the geniuses are all waiting for you.

t_ch: （没错，奇怪的感觉越来越明显了……）
t_en: (No... The discrepancy is getting worse...)

t_ch: 你怎么知道有谁在等我们？
t_en: How do you know who's waiting for us?

t_ch: 嗯？翁法罗斯不就是黄金裔和英雄之旅的世界嘛，用小拇指想想都知道啦。
t_en: Huh? Isn't Amphoreus the world of the Chrysos Heirs and their Hero's Journey? I could figure that out in an instant.

t_ch: （可是，翁法罗斯无法从外界观测，如果没有丹恒转述，她不可能知道这些……）
t_en: (But Amphoreus cannot be observed from the outside. She couldn't possibly know about these things unless Dan Heng told her...)

t_ch: 丹恒呢，他应该回到列车了吧？
t_en: Where's Dan Heng? He should be back on the Express now.

t_ch: 嗯？没有哦，要么是碰巧错开了吧？
t_en: Hmm? No, he's not. Maybe I just happened to miss him?

t_ch: 好啦，丹恒那么可靠，用不着咱俩操心，肯定是在什么地方完好无损地等待我们呢。
t_en: Never mind. Dan Heng's super reliable. We don't need to worry about him. He's probably waiting for us somewhere, all hale and hearty.

t_ch: （不，有天才帮忙，丹恒一定能平安返回。而且我认识的三月，怎么可能对同伴这么漠不关心……）
t_en: (No. The geniuses would have made sure that Dan Heng made it back on the Express. Besides, the March I know wouldn't be so dismissive about her companions...)

t_ch: （…有问题，她不是三月七。）
t_en: (...Something's not right. She's not March 7th.)

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，我想，你是有话要跟我说吧？
t_en: ...I guess you have something you want to say to me, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 那么，不必用问题来检验疑惑。珍惜你我的岁月，坦诚相待吧。
t_en: Then there's no need to feel things out first with questions. Let's treasure the time we have together and be frank.

t_ch: 你…究竟是谁？
t_en: Who... are you?

t_ch: 果然，仅凭记忆的掠影，无法骗过「无名客」的牵绊呢。
t_en: As expected, a glimpse of memory is not enough to deceive the bonds of friendship forged between the Nameless.

t_ch: 那就用不着再掩饰了吧？的确，我们不是你认识的那个「三月七」。
t_en: In that case, there's no need for further deceit. You're right. We're not the "March 7th" you are acquainted with.

t_ch: 但我们有办法将你送回翁法罗斯。只要你愿意帮助我们……
t_en: But we can send you back to Amphoreus... As long as you are willing to help us...

t_ch: 说出你们的身份。
t_en: Who are you people?

t_ch: 流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
t_en: We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.

t_ch: 滥用骗术的人不值得轻信。
t_en: Habitual liars are not trustworthy.

t_ch: 为了取得你的信任，咱们就先自报家门——流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
t_en: We'll introduce ourselves to gain your trust. We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.

t_ch: 你们把三月七怎么了？
t_en: What did you people do with March 7th?

t_ch: 别担心，这幅样子只是借用了你的「记忆」。
t_en: She's fine. This form was simply borrowed from your "memories."

t_ch: 为了取得你的信任，咱们就先自报家门——流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
t_en: We'll introduce ourselves to gain your trust. We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.

t_ch: 提醒一下：在你犹豫的时候，翁法罗斯内部的时间可是在疾速流逝呢。
t_en: Just as a reminder: While you hesitate, time is quickly ticking away in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 你要是想阻止「智识」的敌人，与我们合作是最好的办法哦？
t_en: Working with us is the best way to stop the enemy of Erudition.

t_ch: 「智识」会把和实验无关的结果都当成没用的废数据，丢进垃圾站里，但我们可不那么想。
t_en: Erudition would treat any results unrelated to the experiment as garbage and throw them out, but we don't work like that.

t_ch: 对于「记忆」，这些瞬间可都是编织宇宙的重要质料喔？
t_en: The Remembrance treats all these instances as important materials needed to weave the universe.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，对你这种大英雄来说只是顺手的事，没什么难的啦……
t_en: Besides, this would be child's play for a great hero like you. It won't be hard at all...

t_ch: 而且，万一你们的计划没成功，那个叫铁墓的大反派不小心跑了出来，整个银河就都要遭殃啦。
t_en: Also, if your plan fails and the big bad Irontomb manages to get out, then the whole cosmos will be in danger.

t_ch: 多一个保底方案，不是很好吗？只要你帮助忆庭取回想要的东西，哪怕一切都被铁墓格式化了，我们也能用「记忆」重建世界…甚至宇宙哦。
t_en: Wouldn't it be better to have an additional failsafe? As long as you help the Garden retrieve what we want, even if Irontomb reformats everything in the physical plane, we can use Remembrance to reconstruct the entire world... or, should we say, the entire universe.

t_ch: 所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
t_en: So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」浮黎</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>无漏主</color>{RUBY_E#}已经向你投来了瞥视，别想抵赖——那本「故事书」，就是最好的证明喔。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli the Remembrance</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>The Master of Anāsrava</color>{RUBY_E#} has already glanced at you. Don't deny it. That "storybook" is the best evidence.</color>

t_ch: 我说…你不会是要被她们的花言巧语打动了吧♭
t_en: Say... You aren't seriously gonna be moved by their pretty words, are you?♭

t_ch: 吩咐这些小家伙带你离开监牢的人，是我。
t_en: I am the one who commanded those little ones to lead you out of the prison.

t_ch: 不过，没想到，还引来了想钻空子的小飞虫……
t_en: But I didn't expect to attract little gnats trying to take advantage of the situation...

t_ch: 「记忆」可以帮你回到翁法罗斯，但未必要以他们提供的方式。当然，也不需要你做出任何交易…付出任何代价。
t_en: While Remembrance can help you return to Amphoreus, there's no need for you to do it the way they want you to. Of course, there's also no need for you to make any deal... or pay any price.

t_ch: 对你来说，这应该算得上「好久不见」吧……
t_en: For you, this is probably a "long time no see"...

t_ch: …亲爱的{NICKNAME}♭
t_en: ...My dear {NICKNAME}♭

t_ch: 你是…谁…？
t_en: Who... are... you?

t_ch: 又一个幻影？我不会上当了…
t_en: Another illusion? I won't be tricked again...

t_ch: 嘘，不用说出来。我知道，有许多疑问在你的记忆中打转，你很无助。暂且把它们放在一边吧。现在，你只需相信我。
t_en: Shh. There's no need to say anything. I know. You have so many questions swirling around in your memories at this moment, and you feel so helpless. Put them aside. For now, all you need to do... is trust me.

t_ch: 或者，还需要一些证明？放心，这不难……
t_en: Or... do you need more proof? That won't be hard...

t_ch: 历历在目，对么？
t_en: It's as if they all happened just yesterday, right?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——住口人醒了第一张合照就归我啦不有我们在那种结局绝对不会发生——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...Stop it! They're awake! I'm gonna keep our first photo, alright? No! That end won't come to pass while we're around!</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——现在本姑娘就是罗刹雕像上那人就是丹恒的兄弟左青龙右白虎少吃碳水化合物——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...Aaaand now I'm Luocha~ The statue... is that... ...Dan Heng's brother!? Azure Dragon, White Tiger, eating less carbs...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——她管我叫可爱的小姐哎带我成为高级社员吧就算未来会充满痛苦我们也绝不逃避——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...Did you hear that! She just called me "my lovely lady"...! Help me become a high-ranking member. Even if the future is full of pain... we won't escape from it!</color>

t_ch: <size=28>嘿！本姑娘哐哐给你两拳，看你想不想得起来！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Hey, are you sure? Maybe a couple of punches will help to jog your memory?</size>

t_ch: 我不愿欺骗你。所以，我不会使用「她」的名字。
t_en: I don't want to lie to you, which is why I will not use "her" name.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的三月，属于永夜之帷的时间…暂时以<color=#dbc291ff>长夜月</color>这个称呼，将我放进你的回忆中吧♭
t_en: The third month of Amphoreus is the month reserved for the <color=#dbc291ff>Veil of Evernight</color>... So, place me into your memory using the name "Evernight" for now ♭

t_ch: 「长夜月」…你究竟是？
t_en: "Evernight"... But who—?

t_ch: 我愿意为你解释更多，但不是现在。我们可以有很多、很多私人时间，但翁法罗斯没有。
t_en: I'm happy to explain more, just not now. We might have a lot of time to ourselves, but Amphoreus does not have that luxury.

t_ch: 如果不能阻止「智识」和「毁灭」，你珍视的旅途就会迎来覆灭的前奏——<color=#dbc291ff>不是以琥珀纪，而是以天、分、秒为单位的倒计时。</color>
t_en: If we do not stop Erudition and Destruction, then the journey you've treasured so much will face the prelude to its obliteration, <color=#dbc291ff>a countdown not in Amber Eras, but in days, minutes... seconds.</color>

t_ch: 所以，把这件礼物拿去吧……
t_en: So, take this gift...

t_ch: 一枚滚烫的火种，一场交易的注脚。它承载着期许…和整个世界的热量。
t_en: This burning Coreflame. This footnote of a transaction. It contains hope... and the warmth of the entire world.

t_ch: 「往昔的涟漪」——是她把这团火藏进了「岁月」的长河，期待心愿能够跨越时间，送往未来的你手中。
t_en: "Ripples of past reverie"... She hid this fire in the long river of "Time," hoping that her wishes would transcend time to reach your hands in the future.

t_ch: 现在，带着它回去吧，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。回到翁法罗斯，扭转最后的「再创世」……
t_en: Now, take it, and return with it, dear {NICKNAME}. Return to Amphoreus and overturn the final Era Nova.

t_ch: 去见证那段为「救世主」驻足的岁月，在转瞬即逝的漫长纪元里，永不屈服于「毁灭」命运的抗争……
t_en: Witness the time that stood still for the Deliverer, and the resistance that never bowed to the destiny of Destruction over the long years that passed in a flash.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>然后，就用这枚被「记忆」祝福的火种，回应他们的期许，开拓未来吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Then, with this Coreflame blessed by the Remembrance, respond to their hopes and blaze a trail to the future.</color>

t_ch: 而我会在时间的角落静静注视，等待下一场邂逅的到来……
t_en: And I will silently watch in a corner of time, waiting for our next encounter...

t_ch: 我相信，那不会花上太久。
t_en: I believe the wait won't be too long.

t_ch: （这到底是…怎么回事……）
t_en: (What exactly... is happening...)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…前进…继续「开拓」吧……
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Keep going... Keep trailblazing...

t_ch: 为了翁法罗斯，为了你，也为了你记忆中的「三月七」……
t_en: For Amphoreus, for you, and for the "March 7th" in your memories...

t_ch: 前进吧♭
t_en: Go forth ♭

t_ch: 但愿一切为时未晚——前进吧。
t_en: Let's hope it's not too late — onward we go.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯需要「救世主」。
t_en: Amphoreus needs the "Deliverer."

t_ch: 我相信三月…哪怕她变了模样。
t_en: I trust in March... even if she no longer looks the same.

t_ch: 小家伙…听得到吗？
t_en: Can you hear me... little one?

t_ch: （那是…黑塔的声音？）
t_en: (Is that... Herta's voice?)

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>警告，发现异常数据传输……</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Warning. Abnormal data transmission detected...]</color>

t_ch: 快点，跑两步。我维持不了多久。
t_en: Hurry up. Put some speed into it! I can't keep this up for much longer.

t_ch: （三月？她怎么会在这里？！）
t_en: (March? What's she doing here!?)

t_ch: 快来！这道门应该就是出口了。
t_en: Hurry! This door should be the exit.

t_ch: （也许只是错觉…先跟上她吧。）
t_en: (Maybe my instincts are wrong... Let's follow her first.)

t_ch: 从未见过的奇异生命…于它剔透的身躯间，你似乎看到了许多熟悉的光影……
t_en: A strange being unlike anything you've seen before... Through its translucent body, you seem to catch many familiar fleeting shadows...

t_ch: 第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次永劫回归 光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年
t_en: <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th eternal recurrence. Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>

t_ch: （这里是…奥赫玛？）
t_en: (Is this... Okhema?)

t_ch: （空无一人，黎明机器也熄灭了……）
t_en: (No one's here, and the Dawn Device's off...)

t_ch: （我…来迟了吗？）
t_en: (Am I... too late?)

t_ch: 识刻锚？
t_en: The Chronocognitive Anchor?

t_ch: 我设想过好多重逢的话语，可话到口边，却只留下了这一句……
t_en: There's so much I wanted to say for our reunion, yet now that you're back, there's only one thing to say...

t_ch: 欢迎回来，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Welcome back, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 真是度过了好长、好长的时光呀。
t_en: It's been such a long, long time.

t_ch: 昔涟！太好了，你还在…
t_en: Cyrene! I'm so glad you're still here...

t_ch: 我不在时，世界发生了什么？
t_en: What happened to the world while I was gone?

t_ch: 我见到了三月，她不太对劲。
t_en: I saw March 7th, and she looked really weird.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，现在一定很困扰吧？你不在的这段时间，翁法罗斯发生了好多事。
t_en: You must be really confused right now, aren't you, {NICKNAME}? So much has happened in Amphoreus while you were gone.

t_ch: 别担心，「救世主」可不能带着迷茫，对吧？现在…请跟着我，翻开「岁月」的长卷，看看大家为你留下的话语。
t_en: But don't worry. The Deliverer can't afford to be lost, no? Now... please follow me and turn the pages of Time and hear the words everyone left for you.

t_ch: 我会把这一千年的故事都讲给你听。这样一来，它们就不再是我一个人的回忆。
t_en: I'll tell you the story of this thousand-year journey. That way, it won't just be my memories alone.

t_ch: 时光飞逝，距离「救世主」遭逢意外，已经过去了两百年啊……
t_en: Time flies. Two hundred years have passed since the Deliverer's fall...

t_ch: 为了阻止来古士，*我们*不得不归还了「律法」、「浪漫」、「海洋」三枚火种，可即便如此……
t_en: We had to return three Coreflames of Law, Romance, and Ocean to stop Lygus. But even so...

t_ch: 荒笛已经陨落，两位天才杳无音信，刻律德菈也拥抱了她的命运，这样下去……
t_en: Terravox has fallen, the two geniuses vanished without a trace, and Cerydra embraced her fate... At this rate...

t_ch: 「再创世」一定会到来，令翁法罗斯坠入「毁灭」。
t_en: "Era Nova" will come, and Amphoreus will fall into the Destruction.

t_ch: 看来，改写结局的关键，还是回到了「负世」的火种。
t_en: It seems the key to rewriting the end once again lies in the Coreflame of Worldbearing.

t_ch: 依照两位天才留下的指示，我们无论如何都要把它传到{RUBY_B#救世主}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}手里。
t_en: According to the instructions left behind by those two geniuses, we must get it into {RUBY_B#Deliverer}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}'s hands, no matter the cost.

t_ch: 可是，该怎么做？
t_en: But how?

t_ch: 不仅要找到藏匿火种的方法，还要从来古士手中争取足够多的时间……
t_en: We need to find a way to hide the Coreflame, and we must buy enough time to keep Lygus at bay...

t_ch: 关于这件事，小涟有个好消息。
t_en: About that... Reney might have some good news.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>昨晚，她又做了那个梦。在梦里，泰坦的声音前所未有地清晰……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She had that dream again last night, but the Titan's voice was clearer than ever this time...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她说，把火光传向未来吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She said: Pass the flame into the future.</color>

t_ch: 这是欧洛尼斯的神谕？这一次，她选择站在人类这边，藏匿一位同胞的火种？
t_en: Is that a prophecy from Oronyx? She chose to side with humanity this time and hide one of her kin's Coreflames?

t_ch: …看来翁法罗斯的命运，确实未到收梢之时。
t_en: ...It seems Amphoreus' fate isn't sealed just yet.

t_ch: 是啊。历史已经改变了，无论人类，还是泰坦，都愿意为了世界的存续拼尽全力。
t_en: You're right. History has changed. Humans and Titans are both giving their all to keep this world going.

t_ch: 冥冥之中，一场跨越纪元的漫长接力，或许就要开始了啊。
t_en: Perhaps a relay across the ages is finally about to begin somewhere out there.

t_ch: 可惜，生活永远不会一帆风顺。拉冬军队已经兵临城下，他们的领头人……
t_en: Unfortunately, life will never go smoothly. Ladon's army is already at our gates, and their commander...

t_ch: 那个吕枯耳戈斯，他现在就在奥赫玛门前。
t_en: That Lycurgus... he's right outside Okhema.

t_ch: 「光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，刻律德菈以出征法吉娜为由，献祭五百名黄金裔的性命，完成『律法』试炼。这一惨剧震动了整个翁法罗斯。」
t_en: "Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>. Cerydra, under the pretense of a campaign against Phagousa, sacrificed <unbreak>500</unbreak> Chrysos Heirs to complete the Trial of Law. This tragedy shook everyone in Amphoreus."

t_ch: 「同年，『凯撒』刻律德菈遇刺身亡，『金织』阿格莱雅接过统领职责。人类的第二次逐火之旅，在摇摇欲坠中开启。」
t_en: "That same year, Cerydra the Imperator was assassinated, after which Aglaea the Goldweaver took command. Thus began humanity's second Flame-Chase Journey, a path hanging by a thread."

t_ch: 云石天宫沦为废墟，许多凡人因你们的顽抗白白丧生。
t_en: The Marmoreal Palace lies in ruins. Countless mortals have perished because of your stubborn resistance.

t_ch: 是时候看清拒绝的代价了。现在，重新回答我的问题……
t_en: It's time you learned the cost of refusal. Now, answer my question again...

t_ch: 刻法勒的火种身在何处？
t_en: Where is Kephale's Coreflame?

t_ch: 你觉得将圣城夷为平地，就可以找到它么？我看…你只能徒然落得一身尘灰。
t_en: You really think you'll find it by razing the holy city to the ground? From what I see... all you'll get is dust and disappointment.

t_ch: 别忘记，出于「律法」…你也无法杀死预言中的黄金裔。
t_en: Don't forget... You can't kill the Chrysos Heirs mentioned in the prophecy because of Law.

t_ch: 我从未否认这点。
t_en: I have never denied that.

t_ch: 所以，我只能寄希望于奥赫玛虔诚的公民，希望他们能在各位的哀嚎声中，为我献上答案。
t_en: Which is why I now place my hope in the faithful citizens of Okhema. Perhaps they'll give me what I seek in the echo of your screams.

t_ch: 接下来，鄙人要将诸位的胸膛剖开，用滚烫的金血为人们施以洗礼，请容我先行致歉——就从你开始，昏盲的「金织」女士。
t_en: Now then, I'll be cutting open your chests and using your scalding golden blood to baptize the masses. Allow me to apologize in advance. We shall start with you, blind and foolish Lady Goldweaver.

t_ch: 这里交给我，阿格莱雅女士，快离开……
t_en: Leave this to me, Lady Aglaea. You must get away now...

t_ch: 不，圣女。该留下来的人是我。
t_en: No, Holy Maiden. I'm the one who must stay.

t_ch: 什么……
t_en: What...

t_ch: 他的阴谋不会得逞，因为「浪漫」将要兑现诺言，为翁法罗斯编织一袭坚不可摧的战袍……
t_en: His conspiracy won't succeed, because Romance is ready to make good on their promise to weave an indestructible armor for Amphoreus...

t_ch: 它的名字是「团结」。你要全身而退，将我的死讯带给仍在抗争的战士，与他们一同继续前行。
t_en: Its name is "solidarity." You must escape with your life and carry word of my death to those still fighting, then keep going with them.

t_ch: 正如凯撒以死点燃了抗争的火炬，我的离去会让这一簇火苗永不凋零。
t_en: Just as the Imperator lit the torch of resistance with her death, my passing will make this flame everlasting.

t_ch: 呵护好它，把它带向未来…交给我们的「救世主」吧。
t_en: Take good care of it, guide it to the future, and place it into the hands of our "Deliverer."

t_ch: 「…五十年后，来古士再次率军进攻奥赫玛。他单刀直入圣城，摧毁云石天宫，世人称之为『第三次奥赫玛围城战』。」
t_en: "Fifty years later, Lygus led his forces once again to Okhema. He charged directly into the holy city and razed the Marmoreal Palace. History would name this battle 'The Third Siege of Okhema'."

t_ch: 「这场战役中，共有九万青壮为奥赫玛英勇就义，其中也包括他们无畏的领袖——阿格莱雅。」
t_en: "Ninety thousand brave souls gave their lives for Okhema that day, including their fearless leader, Aglaea."

t_ch: 她…就这么走了？
t_en: She just left... like that?

t_ch: 小蝶已经下定决心。*我们*也不能辜负她的觉悟。
t_en: Since Cas has made up her mind, we can't let her resolve be in vain.

t_ch: 可是，留在奥赫玛等死，和去斯缇科西亚等死有什么区别？
t_en: But between staying in Okhema and going to Styxia... What difference does it make when it's death either way!

t_ch: 我反对<color=#dbc291ff>迁都</color>。奥赫玛有{RUBY_B#黎明机器}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑，不比那死城安全多了？
t_en: I'm against <color=#dbc291ff>relocating</color>. With {RUBY_B#Dawn Device}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection, isn't Okhema far safer than that dead city?

t_ch: 小蝶的计划里，可没有「迁都」这一说哦。
t_en: Cas's plan doesn't involve any "relocation" at all.
...Huh?

t_ch: 就像你说的，奥赫玛是人类的庇护所。*我们*从没打算让大家搬到斯缇科西亚去……
t_en: Like you said, Okhema is humanity's refuge. We never intended to get everyone moving to Styxia...

t_ch: 为「救世主」准备最后的底牌，靠小蝶、我、海瑟音三个人就够啦。
t_en: It's just on Cas, Hysilens, and me to prepare the final trump card for the Deliverer.

t_ch: 啊？什么底牌这么神，要你们三个半神一块儿把自己赔进去？
t_en: Wait. What kind of trump card needs all three of you demigods to throw yourselves away?

t_ch: 我们要铺好未来的道路，确保「救世主」回来后，能平安抵达「再创世」的场所。
t_en: We must lay down the path to the future so when the "Deliverer" returns, they'll have a clear road to reach the location of "Era Nova".

t_ch: 斯缇科西亚是死亡与海洋交汇的城邦。在那里，结合「海洋」和「门径」的权能，*我们*就能创造出一条通往创世涡心的洋流……
t_en: Styxia sits where death meets the ocean. There, with the combined powers of Ocean and Passage, we can summon a current that leads to the Vortex of Genesis...

t_ch: 而「死亡」的半神会永远看护这条密道，直到{RUBY_B#救世主}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}归来。
t_en: And the Demigod of Death will forever guard that secret path until {RUBY_B#Deliverer}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#} returns.

t_ch: 谁都知道，来古士一定会把创世涡心当作目标。
t_en: We all know Lygus will set his sights on the Vortex of Genesis.

t_ch: 正因如此，*我们*才必须这么做。
t_en: That's exactly why we have to do this.

t_ch: 到底是哀地里亚的督战圣女，比我想象中有魄力多了。
t_en: Guess I underestimated Aidonia's Maiden of War. She's got way more steel than I thought.

t_ch: 以及，赛飞儿，*我们*希望你尽快去一趟悬锋城。不管用什么方法，一定要和「纷争」结成同盟。
t_en: And Cipher, we need you to head to Castrum Kremnos as soon as possible. By any means necessary, forge an alliance with Strife.

t_ch: 预言中的王储已经诞生。他将成为奥赫玛新的捍卫者，在我们离去后继续守护这片土地。
t_en: The prophesied crown prince has already been born. He shall become the new defender of Okhema, protecting this land after we leave.

t_ch: 关于这个，倒是不用担心……
t_en: You don't need to worry about that...

t_ch: 我就是从悬锋城回来的，只是比消息快了一步。
t_en: I just came back from Castrum Kremnos, only a step ahead of the news.

t_ch: 缇宝，有什么东西正在朝奥赫玛飞来，特别特别快——
t_en: Tribbie, something's flying towards Okhema, and it's really fast...

t_ch: <size=28>——呀！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Eek!</size>

t_ch: 怎、怎么了？
t_en: Wh—What is it?

t_ch: 是、是一根长矛……
t_en: It's... it's a spear!

t_ch: 是悬锋人，他们的王已经来了。
t_en: It's the Kremnoans. Their king's already here.

t_ch: 「在缇里西庇俄丝、赛法利娅两位半神庇护下，奥赫玛挺过连番施压，但也逐渐难以为继。遐蝶决定将斯缇科西亚作为最后手段，遂完成『死亡』试炼，令淤滞的冥河尽数退去。」
t_en: "With the protection of the demigods Tribios and Cifera, Okhema endured wave after wave of warfare, though just barely. Castorice chose Styxia as the last resort and completed the Trial of Death, causing the stagnant waters in the River of Souls to recede."

t_ch: 「随后，缇里西庇俄丝踏上远行。同年，悬锋王欧利庞携王子迈德漠斯加入同盟，投身救世之战，为圣城保驾护航。」
t_en: "Soon after, Tribios departed on a long journey. That same year, the Kremnoan king Eurypon, along with his son, prince Mydeimos, joined the alliance to safeguard the holy city in the battle of deliverance."

t_ch: 可、可是…那会很痛的！
t_en: B—But... it's gonna hurt! A lot!

t_ch: 痛苦会带来漫长的折磨，但它绝无可能摧毁我。
t_en: Pain brings endless torment, but it can never destroy me.

t_ch: 我相信，当*你*跨越万径之门，跃下悬崖时，一定怀抱着同样的想法。
t_en: I believe that you were thinking the same thing when you stepped through the Gate of Infinity and jumped off that cliff.

t_ch: 呜，无法反驳……
t_en: Ugh... can't argue with that...

t_ch: 就现状而言，这也是奥赫玛拥有的唯一选择。照我说的做吧……
t_en: In the current situation, this is the only path Okhema has left. Just do as I say...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>将我的灵魂裂成五份，为我打造不朽的躯壳……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Split my soul into five pieces, forge me an immortal vessel...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>令「纷争」的锋刃永远高悬，同它的敌人厮杀到世界尽头！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Let the blade of Strife hang forever overhead, locked in battle with their enemies to the world's bitter end!</color>

t_ch: 不必忧伤，缇里西庇俄丝女士。我们已向那预言中的明天前进许多了，不是么？
t_en: There is no need to be sad, Lady Tribios. Haven't we already taken great strides towards that promised tomorrow?

t_ch: 这一世，我的族人不必再沉沦于虚伪的指引。悬锋的命运已经洗去血污。
t_en: In this life, my people no longer have to drown in false guidance. Kremnos has washed the blood off its fate.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯不再需要名为「纷争」的神。所以，也让我砸毁旧律，令「天谴之矛」重新变作捍卫世界的武器吧。
t_en: Amphoreus no longer needs a god named Strife. So let me shatter the former laws and turn the Lance of Fury back into a weapon that protects the world.

t_ch: *我们*…明白了。
t_en: We... understand.

t_ch: 另外，能再帮我一个忙么？
t_en: By the way, can you do me another favor?

t_ch: 神悟树庭七贤人已踏上行程，不日将逐批抵达，投身抵抗事业。在他们中，有一位名叫阿那克萨戈拉斯的学者……
t_en: The Seven Sages from Grove of Epiphany are already en route. They'll arrive in waves to join the resistance in a couple of days. Among them is a scholar named Anaxagoras...

t_ch: 此人眼界超凡，无畏牺牲。这场「裂魂仪式」不仅是我的决断，更源于他的谏言。他的智谋必将成为翁法罗斯存续的中坚力量——
t_en: He has extraordinary insight and fears no sacrifice. This Soul-Rending Ceremony wasn't just my decision. It was his counsel. His wisdom will surely be the backbone of Amphoreus' survival.

t_ch: 照看好他。然后，代我将这不熄的烈火传递下去。
t_en: Watch over him. Carry on this everlasting flame for me.

t_ch: 「经由阿那克萨戈拉斯的仪式，『纷争』半神将自己的灵魂分为荣耀、勇气、坚韧、牺牲、理性五份，封入血晶，投身战场……」
t_en: "Through Anaxagoras's ritual, the Demigod of Strife split his soul into five: Courage, Honor, Tenacity, Sacrifice, and Reason, each sealed in blood crystal and cast into battle."

t_ch: 「世人为神王的陨落举行了为期十日的盛大葬礼，而他用牺牲——为人类换来了两百年和平的时光。」
t_en: "The people held a ten-day funeral to mourn their fallen God-King. And through his sacrifice, humanity was granted two hundred years of peace."

t_ch: 「理性」和「诡计」……
t_en: Reason and Trickery...

t_ch: 真没想到，最后的布局要你我联手完成。
t_en: Never thought we'd be the pair to finish this final setup.

t_ch: 要捉住那铁皮人，没你的小把戏可不行。况且，这是咱们最后的机会了，没什么可挑剔的，是吧？
t_en: Can't catch that Tin Man without your little sleights. Besides, this is our last shot. Not the time to be picky, right?

t_ch: 别把事情想太简单，来古士刚发现奥赫玛过去五十年都是座空城，想必一定气急败坏，什么事都做得出来。
t_en: Don't oversimplify it. Lygus just found out Okhema's been an empty shell for the past fifty years. He's bound to be furious. At this rate, he could've done anything.

t_ch: 哈，要的就是这个！愤怒能蒙蔽人的双眼，管他是什么「天才」，道理同样适用。等他深入议院，和我对峙的时候……
t_en: Ha, that's exactly what we want! Rage blinds even the brightest minds. Doesn't matter how much of a genius he is, the principle still holds. Once he storms into the Council and confronts me head-on...

t_ch: 你就「嘭」地发动炼金术，把他变成笼中困兽。
t_en: You trigger your alchemy with a BOOM and turn him into a caged beast.

t_ch: 且不论你要如何把自己伪装成「救世主」，还不能让任何人发现……
t_en: Easier said than done. You still have to pass yourself off as the Deliverer without anyone catching on...

t_ch: 妄想用人类的炼成阵，囚禁堪比神明的存在？痴人说梦。
t_en: And you really think a human alchemical array can bind a godlike being? That's just nonsense.

t_ch: 你是怂了，还是不相信「诡计」半神的含金量？
t_en: What, getting cold feet? Or you just don't believe in the almighty worth of the demigod of Trickery?

t_ch: 简单点，直接告诉我：能不能做到？
t_en: Just tell me straight: can you do it or not?

t_ch: ——哼，当然可以，且易如反掌。
t_en: Hmph. Of course I can. And it'll be child's play.

t_ch: 但有两个附加条件。这是最后一战，要做就做绝，别留余地。
t_en: But I've got two conditions. Since this is the final act, if we're doing it, we go all in. No half-measures.

t_ch: 哦，怎么说？
t_en: Oh? I'm listening.

t_ch: 一、把战场移动到创世涡心，于情于理，{NICKNAME}出现在那边都更有说服力。
t_en: First, shift the battlefield to the Vortex of Genesis. It would be more convincing if {NICKNAME} were to appear there.

t_ch: 而且，涡心本就是与世隔绝的禁地——换句话说，全翁法罗斯最适合当监狱的地方。
t_en: Besides, the Vortex is cut off from the world. No place in Amphoreus makes a better prison.

t_ch: 你来这么一出，咱们的「救世主」回来后，不就必须和来古士正面对决了？
t_en: If you pull that, wouldn't our Deliverer have to face tank Lygus as soon as they come back?

t_ch: 这一战本就不可避免，我们只能为{M#他}{F#她}创造更多机会，而这正是第二个条件……
t_en: That clash is inevitable. All we can do is create more chances for {M#him.}{F#her.} And that's the second condition...

t_ch: 还记得么？涡心本就归{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}所有，而世上为数不多的幸存者里，恰好还有一位「海洋」的半神。
t_en: The Vortex belongs to {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} in the first place, remember? And there happens to be a Demigod of Ocean among the few survivors in the world.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>把计划告诉海瑟音，让她也加入战局。我会提前将自己炼成贤者之石，写入术式……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Loop Hysilens in. Let her join the final act. I'll transmute myself into a Philosopher's Stone and embed myself into the formula...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>届时，她要将我打碎，将尘砂撒入涡心的海洋。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And when the time comes, she needs to shatter me and scatter that stone's ashes into the ocean within the Vortex.</color>

t_ch: …呵，树庭男孩，人们都说你疯，我看这话一点不假。
t_en: ...Heh. I guess people weren't wrong when they said you're insane, Grove boy.

t_ch: 要算计一位避世的天才，我确实没有头绪；但想叫一个安提基色拉人受苦，「理性」的半神可有一万种方法。
t_en: I've got no idea how to outwit a reclusive genius... But making an Antikytheran suffer? The Demigod of Reason has ten thousand ways to do just that.

t_ch: 而我方才所述，仅是万分之一。
t_en: And what I just mentioned was one of them.

t_ch: 所以，你的术式到底有什么效果？
t_en: So what exactly does your formula do?

t_ch: 这可是剧目的最高潮，怎能轻易泄底？
t_en: Now that would spoil the climax, wouldn't it?

t_ch: 掐指一算，风堇也该完成天空一族的仪式了。
t_en: By now, Hyacine must've completed the Sky people's ritual.

t_ch: 既然那神礼观众和我一样喜好表演，就叫他好好期待你我献上的剧目吧——
t_en: Since that Theoros loves a good performance as much as I do, let's make sure he enjoys our show to the fullest.

t_ch: 至于那「救世主」要如何完成「再创世」，就不是我们需要操心的事了。
t_en: As for how the "Deliverer" will complete the "Era Nova"... well, that will no longer be our concern.
